acquisition method: MS acquisition was done in in positive ion mode over an m/z range of 375–1500 Da at 120,000 resolution in the data dependent mode
alkylation reagent: alkylation performed by addition of 150 mM IAA in ambic buffer
alkylation concentration: addition of 150 mM IAA in ambic buffer 50 mM (15 mM final concentration)
instrument: connected to an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a nano‐ESI ion source
labeling: investigated the performance of a computational pipeline for protein identification and label free quantification (LFQ)
reduction concentration: resuspended in 5.0 mM DTT in 50 mM ambic buffer
